name: superscalar-mcp
description: Query SuperScalar protocol architecture, estimate UTXO savings from shared channel factories, and explore Lightning scaling infrastructure.
long_description: MCP server for SuperScalar — Bitcoin Lightning channel factories that onboard N users into a single shared UTXO with no soft fork required. Explore Decker-Wattenhofer invalidation trees, timeout-signature trees, MuSig2 signing, Poon-Dryja channels, watchtower infrastructure, and Noise NK transport. Estimate on-chain savings from channel factories vs individual Lightning channel opens.

tools.name: superscalar_overview
tools.description: Get an overview of the SuperScalar protocol — Bitcoin Lightning channel factories that onboard N users in one shared UTXO with no soft fork required.

tools.name: superscalar_estimate_savings
tools.description: Estimate on-chain UTXO and fee savings from using SuperScalar channel factories vs individual Lightning channel opens.

tools.name: superscalar_architecture
tools.description: Detailed explanation of a specific SuperScalar component: invalidation tree, timeout-signature tree, channel layer, MuSig2 signing, watchtower, or transport protocol.

tools.name: superscalar_resources
tools.description: Get links to SuperScalar resources: source code, website, related reading on Lightning channel factories, and the original ZmnSCPxj proposal.
